title: CalendarEvent
description: Represents a calendar event or task in SAP Analytics Cloud used for planning workflows and scheduling.

id.description: The unique identifier of the calendar event

name.description: The name of the calendar event

startDate.description: The start date and time of the event

endDate.description: The end date and time of the event

status.description: The current status of the event

assignee.description: The user assigned to the event
